steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtract each term in the second polynomial. The minus sign changes the signs of all terms inside the second parentheses before combining anything:
$$
(7t^4-5t^2+4t-8)-(3t^4-6t^3+7t^2-8)
$$
$$
=7t^4-5t^2+4t-8-3t^4+6t^3-7t^2+8
$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Group terms with the same power of $t$. The constant terms cancel, while the fourth-power, third-power, second-power, and first-power terms remain: $$ (7t^4-3t^4)+6t^3+(-5t^2-7t^2)+4t+(-8+8) $$ $$ =4t^4+6t^3-12t^2+4t $$ The answer is B.
